caption: Hey friends, just captured a dreamy sunrise moment on the cliffs of Santa Margherita and I’m feeling alive 🌞🌊. I slipped into a pastel yellow sundress and a matching bikini top, twirled on the dune from a low-angle front perspective, and the light was soft, highlighting the textures of the sand and the breeze kept my hair bright golden. #fashion #sundress #travel #lifestyle
